title: ModLogs-Mod
description: ModLogs Client is a lightweight Minecraft client mod that integrates with ModLogs Plugin to reliably report essential client-state data.
body:
# ModLogs Mod

Client-side verification mod for Minecraft servers.

---

## 📌 Summary

| Item | Description |
|-----|-------------|
| Type | Client-side mod |
| Purpose | Client verification & monitoring |
| Requires | ModLog Plugin (server-side) |
| Edition | Java Edition |
| Bedrock | Ignored automatically |
| Accounts | Offline & Online |

---

## 🧩 What Does This Mod Do?

ModLog Mod collects **runtime client information** when a player joins a server that uses **ModLog Plugin**.

The collected data is transmitted to the server for moderation, logging, and anti-cheat inspection.

The mod runs silently in the background and does not modify gameplay.

---

## 📊 Collected Client Data

| Data | Description |
|----|------------|
| Username | Player name used to join the server |
| Mods | Full list of loaded client mods |
| Resource Packs | Enabled & disabled resource packs |
| Version | Minecraft client version |

> No personal, hardware, or system-level data is accessed.

---

## 🔗 Required Plugin

This mod allows players to join servers that using **ModLog Plugin**.

| Resource | Link |
|--------|------|
| ModLog Mod | https://modrinth.com/mod/modlog-plugin |

| Rule | Behavior |
|----|----------|
| Mod required | Java players must install ModLog Mod |
| Missing mod | Player may be blocked from joining |
| Validation | Mods & resource packs are verified |
| Reporting | Data is logged or sent to Discord |

This system helps reduce:
- X-Ray abuse
- Unauthorized client modifications
- Hidden resource pack exploits

---

## ⚙️ How It Works

```text
Player joins server
        ↓
ModLog Mod collects client data
        ↓
Data sent to server
        ↓
ModLog Plugin processes & reports
